mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_notification (user_id, type, title, message, link, is_read) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{message}, #{link}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE tb_notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
